commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ff1e4ac842618c1eae8d09b3929dd866338eaf4a)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the shared Control UI bootstrap config path to `/control-ui-config.json`, updates the Vite dev stub and docs, and adds gateway HTTP coverage for a configured `/__openclaw__` base path.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +42, Docs 0. Total +42 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: the default `/__openclaw__/` page can infer `/__openclaw__` as `basePath`, but the gateway with empty configured basePath will not serve the resulting config URL. I did not run tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer repair plus real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not take over while the required proof is a real setup outside automation.

target.title: fix(control-ui): make Control UI bootstrap config endpoint base-path-relative (#66946)
target.body:
## Summary

Opening the Control UI under a base path (e.g. `http://localhost:18789/__openclaw__/`) returned `404` for the runtime config request, so the chat UI never finished bootstrapping. The browser issued `GET /__openclaw__/__openclaw/control-ui-config.json` — the `__openclaw` segment was duplicated — and that URL is not the served endpoint, so it 404s.

Closes #66946.

## Root Cause

`CONTROL_UI_BOOTSTRAP_CONFIG_PATH` was `"/__openclaw/control-ui-config.json"`: it embedded its own path prefix instead of being base-path-relative.

Both sides compose the endpoint the same way — `${basePath}${CONTROL_UI_BOOTSTRAP_CONFIG_PATH}` — in the gateway (`handleControlUiHttpRequest`, `src/gateway/control-ui.ts`) and in the browser loader (`loadControlUiBootstrapConfig`, `ui/src/ui/controllers/control-ui-bootstrap.ts`). The invariant they rely on is that the constant is **relative to the base path**. Because the constant carried a hard-coded `/__openclaw` segment (single trailing underscore, which does not even match the `/__openclaw__` mount prefix), composing it under a real base path doubled the prefix:

- A browser served at `/__openclaw__/` infers `basePath = "/__openclaw__"` (`inferBasePathFromPathname` in `ui/src/ui/navigation.ts`) and fetches `"/__openclaw__"` + `"/__openclaw/control-ui-config.json"` = `/__openclaw__/__openclaw/control-ui-config.json` — exactly the 404 URL in the report.
- The gateway composes the bootstrap route from the same constant, so the served route and the requested route never line up consistently across base paths, and the request falls through to static-file handling and 404s.

The fix belongs on the constant (the single shared source of truth) rather than on either composition site, so the server, the browser loader, the dev stub, and the tests all stay in agreement automatically.

## Fix

Make the constant base-path-relative: `"/control-ui-config.json"`. Composition then yields the correct URL on both sides — `/__openclaw__/control-ui-config.json` under the `/__openclaw__` mount, and `/control-ui-config.json` with no base path.

- `src/gateway/control-ui-contract.ts` — correct the shared constant.
- `ui/vite.config.ts` — align the Vite dev-server stub mount to the same path.
- `docs/web/control-ui.md` — document the base-path-relative endpoint.
- `src/gateway/control-ui.http.test.ts` — add explicit `gateway.controlUi.basePath: "/__openclaw__"` coverage.

All existing tests reference the constant by symbol, so they follow the new value automatically. No `CHANGELOG.md` change.

## Proof — real gateway HTTP behavior, before vs after

The new tests drive the real `handleControlUiHttpRequest` gateway handler with a real `IncomingMessage` under `basePath: "/__openclaw__"` and read back the actual HTTP status / JSON body — the same server boundary the bug crosses. They pin both the correct endpoint and the reporter's doubled URL.

**Command**: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/control-ui.http.test.ts`

**Before** (constant `= "/__openclaw/control-ui-config.json"`) — the two new cases fail across all gateway vitest projects:

```
× ... serves bootstrap config at the base-path-relative endpoint when mounted under /__openclaw__ (#66946)
  → GET /__openclaw__/control-ui-config.json  ⇒ 404   (the correct URL is NOT served)
× ... does not serve bootstrap config from the doubled /__openclaw__/__openclaw path (#66946)
  → GET /__openclaw__/__openclaw/control-ui-config.json  ⇒ 200   (the doubled URL — the reporter's 404 URL — IS the served endpoint)
Tests  6 failed
```

**After** (constant `= "/control-ui-config.json"`) — full file green:

```
Test Files  4 passed (4)
Tests  208 passed (208)
```

After the fix, `GET /__openclaw__/control-ui-config.json` returns `200` with `basePath: "/__openclaw__"`, and the reporter's `GET /__openclaw__/__openclaw/control-ui-config.json` returns `404 Not Found`.
target.author: alix-007
